name: whitespace
author: lumine-code
description: Strips trailing whitespace and adds a trailing newline when an editor is saved.

removeTrailingWhitespace.title: Remove Trailing Whitespace
removeTrailingWhitespace.description: Automatically remove whitespace characters at ends of lines when the buffer is saved. To disable/enable for a certain language, use syntax-scoped properties in your `config.json`.

keepMarkdownLineBreakWhitespace.title: Keep Markdown Line Break Whitespace
keepMarkdownLineBreakWhitespace.description: Markdown uses two or more spaces at the end of a line to signify a line break. Enable this option to keep this whitespace in Markdown files, even if other settings would remove it.

ignoreWhitespaceOnCurrentLine.title: Ignore Whitespace On Current Line
ignoreWhitespaceOnCurrentLine.description: Skip removing trailing whitespace on the line which the cursor is positioned on when the buffer is saved. To disable/enable for a certain language, use [syntax-scoped properties](https://github.com/lumine-code/lumine/tree/master/packages/whitespace#readme) in your `config.json`.

ignoreWhitespaceOnlyLines.title: Ignore Whitespace Only Lines
ignoreWhitespaceOnlyLines.description: Skip removing trailing whitespace on lines which consist only of whitespace characters. To disable/enable for a certain language, use [syntax-scoped properties](https://github.com/lumine-code/lumine/tree/master/packages/whitespace#readme) in your `config.json`.

ensureSingleTrailingNewline.title: Ensure Single Trailing Newline
ensureSingleTrailingNewline.description: If the buffer doesn't end with a newline character when it's saved, then append one. If it ends with more than one newline, remove all but one. To disable/enable for a certain language, use [syntax-scoped properties](https://github.com/lumine-code/lumine/tree/master/packages/whitespace#readme) in your `config.json`.
